intro: A visual novel starring the Vtubers from .LIVE production with a a mix of horror and school comedy.
description:
After School .LIVE -Mirror of Twilight- is a visual novel game starring Cyber Girl Siro, Chieri Kakyoin, and Iori Yamato, the Vtubers from .LIVE production.
It's a story with a mix of horror and school comedy, where the player is the president of the Manga Research Club. Together with three club members, escape the strange, otherworldly after school building.

Your choices shape how the story unfolds, leading to multiple endings.
Break free from the endlessly repeating, never ending after school!


◆Synopsis
“The age of horror is here!”
You and three girls in the Manga Research Club.
After school, you discover a strange shrine inside the building, and in a moment of carelessness you shatter the mirror enshrined there.

In an instant--
the world freezes beneath an eerie sunset.
Shadows shaped like you and the girls begin to wander the corridors of the sealed after school.

“Th■ ag■ o■ ho■■or i■ h■r■!”

One by one, members of the club are attacked by the shadows.
Can you escape this never ending after school?


◆Characters
・Mashiro Momose (CV: Cyber Girl Siro)
Your childhood friend.
She lives next door and comes by every morning to wake you up.
Many says she always looks cheerful and carefree, and it seems they're right, since she doesn't have much worries.
True to her soothing voice, she is laid back and tends to agree with just about anything.
Oddly enough, she happens to be an excellent student straight A's.

・Sakura Otoin (CV: Chieri Kakyoin)
A kouhai in the same Manga Research club. Many calls her Cherry.
She has a soft, airy vibe that puts everyone at ease.
Her special skill is being cute.
She is usually bubbly and acts sweet, but when in panic her tone can suddenly turn rough.
She is basically the straight man of the group.

・Inori Amano (CV: Iori Yamato)
A kouhai in the same Manga Research club.
A natural born oddball who thinks everything is fine as long as everyone is having fun.
A curious free spirit who dislikes conflict.
She has the youngest child energy, and is usually the one getting teased and called out.


○Novel Game Brand "Rabbitfoot”
A novel game brand that delivers novel games casting active YouTubers and VTubers as game characters.
As well as using their names and nicknames, you can enjoy the different sides of your faves and feel a close connection through the novel game that you cannot experience in the usual streaming or video uploads.
